# 04-Knowledge-Intelligence

## Documents

| File | Title | Summary |

| `knowledge_graph_agent.md` | Knowledge Graph Agent | Maintains cross-project intelligence and reusable patterns. Wraps Hindsight + LLM Wiki ops. Publishes the company knowledge graph. |
